title: What is a Budget?
description: Learn the importance of budgeting and how to create a simple budget to manage your expenses.

title: Understanding Savings
description: Discover the power of saving and learn about different ways to save your money effectively.

title: Online Safety Basics
description: Learn how to protect yourself from online threats and navigate the digital world safely.

title: Introduction to Coding
description: Get a gentle introduction to the world of coding and learn some basic programming concepts.
